name: Athletix
description: Athletix is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Columbiana, OH. There are 6 indoor wood courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. A one-time fee is required to play. The facility includes amenities like restrooms.

name: Columbiana Firestone Park
description: Come play pickleball at Columbiana Firestone Park in Columbiana, OH! There are 3 outdoor courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The facility includes amenities like lights. The courts are free.

name: East Liverpool City Pickleball Courts
description: East Liverpool City Pickleball Courts is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in East Liverpool, OH. There are 5 asphalt and wood courts. 2 are indoors and 3 are outdoors. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. A membership is required to play. You can’t reserve the courts.

name: East Palestine City Park
description: East Palestine City Park is a place to play pickleball in East Palestine, OH. There are 2 outdoor concrete courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The courts are free.

name: Firestone park
description: Firestone park is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in East Palestine, OH. There are 3 outdoor hard courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The courts are free.

name: Salem Community Center
description: Come play pickleball at Salem Community Center in Salem, OH! There are 4 indoor courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. Amenities include food, restrooms, water, wheelchair accessibility, and lights. A one-time fee is required to play.

name: Salem Waterworth Park
description: Salem Waterworth Park is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Salem, OH. There are 3 outdoor courts. The lines are overlaid on a tennis court, so the net is a little taller than a normal pickleball net. The courts are free.
